description.value:
Your feet move faster, almost out of your conscious control. You gain a +5-foot status bonus to your Speeds for 1 minute.

If you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Cursebound]{Cursebound 2} at any point during this duration, the bonus increases to a +10-foot status bonus. If you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Cursebound]{Cursebound 3} at any point during this duration, this bonus increases to +15-foot status bonus instead. Finally, if you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Cursebound]{Cursebound 4} at any point during this duration, this bonus increases to a +20-foot status bonus.
